entities.name: TETRASTICHUS HOWARDI
entities.description: A hyperparasitoid wasp that parasitizes tachinid parasitoids of Helicoverpa armigera

entities.name: GONIOPHTALMUS HALLI
entities.description: A tachinid parasitoid that attacks Helicoverpa armigera pupae

entities.name: SENOMETOPIA ILLOTA
entities.description: A tachinid parasitoid that attacks Helicoverpa armigera pupae

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: A lepidopteran pest whose pupae are targeted by parasitoids

entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: The crop plant where the parasitoid interactions were observed

entities.name: SOUTHERN INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region where the study was conducted

entities.name: HYPERPARASITISM
entities.description: The biological process where a parasitoid is itself parasitized by another parasitoid

entities.name: PRIMARY PARASITOID
entities.description: A parasitoid that directly attacks the primary host

entities.name: PUPAL GUILD PARASITOID
entities.description: A parasitoid that attacks hosts in the pupal stage regardless of whether they are already parasitized
